EN.title: Network map (Private)
EN.description: Tailnet, VPSes, PCs, services, ports, and how we access them. Private (tailnet-only).
EN.body:
# Network map (Private)

## Quick facts / Faits rapides

- **Tailnet:** `tail1764b8.ts.net`
- **Private docs:** `docs.vaultwares.ca` (tailnet-only)
- **Public website:** `vaultwares.ca` (public)
- **Ops log (today):** `operations/ops-log-2026-05-21`
- **Services inventory:** `operations/services-inventory`

## Diagram (Mermaid) / Diagramme (Mermaid)

```mermaid
flowchart TB
  %% Public entrypoints (Internet)
  subgraph Internet["Public (Internet)"]
    Users["Public users"]
    VaultWaresCA["vaultwares.ca\n(vaultwares-website)\nHTTPS :443"]
    Flows["flows.vaultwares.ca\n(vault-flows SPA)\nHTTPS :443"]
    Noddit["noddit.org\n(vault-flows SPA)\nHTTPS :443"]
    PromKing["prom-king.xyz\n(tube)\nHTTPS :443"]
    FullXXX["fullxxx.video\n(tube)\nHTTPS :443"]
    LinksPK["links.prom-king.xyz\n(link-sharing)\nHTTPS :443"]
    LinksFXV["links.fullxxx.video\n(link-sharing)\nHTTPS :443"]
  end

  %% Tailnet-only entrypoints
  subgraph Tailnet["Private (Tailnet-only)"]
    Docs["docs.vaultwares.ca\n(vaultwares-docs)\nHTTPS :443"]
    Monitor["monitor.vaultwares.ca\n(vault-monitor)\nHTTPS :443"]
    Stats["stats.vaultwares.ca\n(agent-ledger stats SPA)\nHTTPS :443"]
    Secrets["warden.vaultwares.ca\n(VaultWarden / vault-warden)\nHTTPS :443"]
    Ledger["ledger.vaultwares.ca\n(agent-ledger SPA)\nHTTPS :443"]
    Hooks["hooks.vaultwares.ca/github\n(vw-webhookd)\nHTTPS :443"]
    Api["api.vaultwares.ca\n(nginx proxy)\nHTTPS :443"]
    PCAPI["Clopeux-Desktop\nVaultWares API\nhttp://100.71.101.21:9001"]
    VaultFlowsSPA["Clopeux-Desktop\nvault-flows (local preview)\nhttps://localhost:3100"]
    RDP["Clopeux-Desktop RDP\n100.71.101.21:3389"]
  end

  %% Machines
  subgraph Machines["Machines"]
    V1["greencloud-vps (GreenCloud VPS)\nDebian 12\nPublic 173.249.194.15\nTailnet 100.73.93.84"]
    V0["ci-egress-vps (Old VPS)\nDebian 12\nPublic 212.193.6.35\nTailnet 100.73.57.6"]
    PC["Clopeux-Desktop\nWindows\nTailnet 100.71.101.21"]
    Brume2["Brume2\nOpenWrt\nTailnet 100.67.153.112"]
  end

  %% Public routing (nginx on VPS)
  Users -->|HTTPS| VaultWaresCA --> V1
  Users -->|HTTPS| Flows --> V1
  Users -->|HTTPS| Noddit --> V1
  Users -->|HTTPS| PromKing --> V1
  Users -->|HTTPS| FullXXX --> V1
  Users -->|HTTPS| LinksPK --> V1
  Users -->|HTTPS| LinksFXV --> V1

  %% Tailnet routing
  Docs --> V1
  Monitor --> V1
  Stats --> V1
  Secrets --> V1
  Ledger --> V1
  Hooks --> V1
  Api -->|proxy| PCAPI --> PC
  Stats -->|/monitor + telemetry proxy| PCAPI
  Noddit -->|proxy| VaultFlowsSPA --> PC
  VaultWaresCA -->|future API calls| PCAPI --> PC

  %% Ops access
  V1 <-->|Tailscale (WireGuard)| PC
  V0 <-->|Tailscale (WireGuard)| PC
  Brume2 <-->|Tailscale (WireGuard)| PC
  RDP --> PC
```

### diagrams.net (draw.io) source (optional)

- Source file: `images/diagrams/vaultwares-network.drawio`
- Recommended workflow: edit the `.drawio` in diagrams.net, export an `.svg`, and embed it here (Mermaid remains the canonical text source).

## Machines / Machines

> This page intentionally avoids passwords/tokens. Store secrets in VaultWarden (`https://secrets.vaultwares.ca`, tailnet-only).

| Machine | Role | OS | Tailnet IP | Public IP | Access |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| `Clopeux-Desktop` | PC / API host | Windows | `100.71.101.21` | (home) | RDP over Tailnet (`3389`), API on `9001` |
| `Brume2` | Home gateway (DHCP/DNS/router) | OpenWrt | `100.67.153.112` | (home) | Tailnet admin only |
| `greencloud-vps` | **New VPS** (GreenCloud) | Debian 12 | `100.73.93.84` | `173.249.194.15` | SSH **tailnet-only**, HTTPS public services |
| `ci-egress-vps` | **Old VPS** | Debian 12 | `100.73.57.6` | `212.193.6.35` | SSH **tailnet-only**, legacy services |

## Services / Services

### Public (Internet)

| Service | URL | Where | Ports | TLS |
|---|---|---:|---:|---|
| VaultWares website | `https://vaultwares.ca` | `greencloud-vps` | `443` | Let’s Encrypt (nginx) |
| vault-flows SPA | `https://flows.vaultwares.ca` | `greencloud-vps` | `443` | Let’s Encrypt (nginx) |
| Noddit | `https://noddit.org` | `greencloud-vps` (proxy to PC) | `443` | Let’s Encrypt (nginx) |
| Prom King | `https://prom-king.xyz` | `greencloud-vps` | `443` | Let’s Encrypt (nginx) |
| FullXXX | `https://fullxxx.video` | `greencloud-vps` | `443` | Let’s Encrypt (nginx) |
| Link sharing (PK) | `https://links.prom-king.xyz` | `greencloud-vps` | `443` | Let’s Encrypt (nginx) |
| Link sharing (FXV) | `https://links.fullxxx.video` | `greencloud-vps` | `443` | Let’s Encrypt (nginx) |

### Private (Tailnet-only)

| Service | URL / Endpoint | Where | Ports | Auth |
|---|---|---:|---:|---|
| Private docs | `https://docs.vaultwares.ca` | `greencloud-vps` | `443` | Tailnet ACL + nginx allowlist |
| Agent ledger | `https://ledger.vaultwares.ca` | `greencloud-vps` | `443` | Tailnet ACL + nginx allowlist |
| V.A.U.L.T Monitor | `https://monitor.vaultwares.ca` | `greencloud-vps` | `443` | Tailnet ACL + nginx allowlist; `/monitor/*` proxies to `Clopeux-Desktop:9001` |
| Stats dashboard | `https://stats.vaultwares.ca` | `greencloud-vps` | `443` | Tailnet ACL + nginx allowlist; static agent-ledger SPA with `/monitor/*` and `/api/telemetry/*` proxied to `Clopeux-Desktop:9001` |
| API (gateway) | `https://api.vaultwares.ca` | `greencloud-vps` | `443` | Tailnet ACL + `X-VW-Gateway-Secret` |
| VaultWares API (direct) | `http://100.71.101.21:9001` | `Clopeux-Desktop` | `9001` | App auth (JWT/API key), Tailnet ACL |
| VaultWarden (secrets service) | `https://warden.vaultwares.ca` | `greencloud-vps` | `443` | Tailnet ACL + VaultWarden authz |
| GitHub webhooks (receiver) | `https://hooks.vaultwares.ca/github` | `greencloud-vps` | `443` | Webhook signature verification (nginx → `vw-webhookd` on `127.0.0.1:9033`) |
| Tailscale webhook handler | `http://127.0.0.1:8787` | `greencloud-vps` | `8787` | Tailnet-local only (`vaultwares-hooks`) |

## Access model / Modèle d’accès

- **Network encryption:** Tailscale (WireGuard).
- **Public TLS:** nginx + Let’s Encrypt on VPSes.
- **SSH:** **Tailnet-only** (port `22` allowed only on `tailscale0`).
- **RDP:** Tailnet-only to `Clopeux-Desktop:3389` (policy-controlled).

## Onboarding checklist / Liste d’intégration

1. Join the tailnet (Tailscale client).
2. Confirm your device appears in the admin console and is authorized.
3. Read this page and the Tailscale policy doc.
4. Get access to VaultWarden (`https://warden.vaultwares.ca`) (tailnet allowlist + service authz).
5. Verify:
   - You can reach `docs.vaultwares.ca` from tailnet.
   - You can reach `vaultwares.ca` publicly.
   - You can reach the PC API endpoint needed for your work (policy permitting).

QC.title: Carte réseau (Privé)
QC.description: Tailnet, VPS, PC, services, ports et comment nous y accédons. Privé (seulement sur le tailnet).
QC.body:
# Carte réseau (Privé)

## Comment lire cette page (super simple)

Imagine 3 “endroits” :

1. **Internet (public)** : la grande rue. N’importe qui peut frapper à la porte.
2. **Tailnet (privé)** : un corridor privé. Juste les appareils autorisés peuvent entrer.
3. **Machines** : nos ordinateurs (PC + serveurs) qui font rouler les services.

```mermaid
flowchart LR
  Public["Internet (public)"] -->|HTTPS 443| VPS["greencloud-vps\n(le serveur public)"]
  Tailnet["Tailnet (privé)\nTailscale"] <--> VPS
  Tailnet <--> PC["Clopeux-Desktop\n(le PC)"]
```

<Tip>
  Si tu montres ça à un public non-tech : garde juste l’idée “Internet = public, Tailnet = corridor privé”.
</Tip>

## Faits rapides

- **Tailnet:** `tail1764b8.ts.net`
- **Docs privés:** `docs.vaultwares.ca` (seulement sur le tailnet)
- **Site web public:** `vaultwares.ca` (public)
- **Journal des opérations (aujourd'hui):** `operations/ops-log-2026-05-21`
- **Inventaire des services:** `operations/services-inventory`

## Diagramme (Mermaid)

```mermaid
flowchart TB
  %% Public entrypoints (Internet)
  subgraph Internet["Public (Internet)"]
    Users["Public users"]
    VaultWaresCA["vaultwares.ca\n(vaultwares-website)\nHTTPS :443"]
    Flows["flows.vaultwares.ca\n(vault-flows SPA)\nHTTPS :443"]
    Noddit["noddit.org\n(vault-flows SPA)\nHTTPS :443"]
    PromKing["prom-king.xyz\n(tube)\nHTTPS :443"]
    FullXXX["fullxxx.video\n(tube)\nHTTPS :443"]
    LinksPK["links.prom-king.xyz\n(link-sharing)\nHTTPS :443"]
    LinksFXV["links.fullxxx.video\n(link-sharing)\nHTTPS :443"]
  end

  %% Tailnet-only entrypoints
  subgraph Tailnet["Private (Tailnet-only)"]
    Docs["docs.vaultwares.ca\n(vaultwares-docs)\nHTTPS :443"]
    Monitor["monitor.vaultwares.ca\n(vault-monitor)\nHTTPS :443"]
    Secrets["warden.vaultwares.ca\n(VaultWarden / vault-warden)\nHTTPS :443"]
    Hooks["hooks.vaultwares.ca/github\n(vw-webhookd)\nHTTPS :443"]
    Api["api.vaultwares.ca\n(nginx proxy)\nHTTPS :443"]
    PCAPI["Clopeux-Desktop\nVaultWares API\nhttp://100.71.101.21:9001"]
    VaultFlowsSPA["Clopeux-Desktop\nvault-flows (local preview)\nhttps://localhost:3100"]
    RDP["Clopeux-Desktop RDP\n100.71.101.21:3389"]
  end

  %% Machines
  subgraph Machines["Machines"]
    V1["greencloud-vps (GreenCloud VPS)\nDebian 12\nPublic 173.249.194.15\nTailnet 100.73.93.84"]
    V0["ci-egress-vps (Old VPS)\nDebian 12\nPublic 212.193.6.35\nTailnet 100.73.57.6"]
    PC["Clopeux-Desktop\nWindows\nTailnet 100.71.101.21"]
    Brume2["Brume2\nOpenWrt\nTailnet 100.67.153.112"]
  end

  %% Public routing (nginx on VPS)
  Users -->|HTTPS| VaultWaresCA --> V1
  Users -->|HTTPS| Flows --> V1
  Users -->|HTTPS| Noddit --> V1
  Users -->|HTTPS| PromKing --> V1
  Users -->|HTTPS| FullXXX --> V1
  Users -->|HTTPS| LinksPK --> V1
  Users -->|HTTPS| LinksFXV --> V1

  %% Tailnet routing
  Docs --> V1
  Monitor --> V1
  Secrets --> V1
  Hooks --> V1
  Api -->|proxy| PCAPI --> PC
  Noddit -->|proxy| VaultFlowsSPA --> PC
  VaultWaresCA -->|future API calls| PCAPI --> PC

  %% Ops access
  V1 <-->|Tailscale (WireGuard)| PC
  V0 <-->|Tailscale (WireGuard)| PC
  Brume2 <-->|Tailscale (WireGuard)| PC
  RDP --> PC
```

### Source diagrams.net (draw.io) (optionnel)

- Fichier source: `images/diagrams/vaultwares-network.drawio`
- Flux de travail recommandé: éditer le `.drawio` dans diagrams.net, exporter un `.svg`, et l'intégrer ici (Mermaid reste la source textuelle canonique).

## Machines

> Cette page évite intentionnellement les mots de passe/jetons. Stockez les secrets dans VaultWarden (`https://warden.vaultwares.ca`, seulement sur le tailnet).

| Machine | Rôle | OS | IP Tailnet | IP Publique | Accès |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| `Clopeux-Desktop` | PC / hôte de pipelines | Windows | `100.71.101.21` | (domicile) | Bureau à distance (RDP) sur le Tailnet (`3389`), API sur `9001` |
| `Brume2` | Passerelle domestique (DHCP/DNS/routeur) | OpenWrt | `100.67.153.112` | (domicile) | Administration Tailnet seulement |
| `greencloud-vps` | **Nouveau VPS** (GreenCloud) | Debian 12 | `100.73.93.84` | `173.249.194.15` | SSH **seulement sur le tailnet**, services HTTPS publics |
| `ci-egress-vps` | **Ancien VPS** | Debian 12 | `100.73.57.6` | `212.193.6.35` | SSH **seulement sur le tailnet**, services hérités |

## Services

### Public (Internet)

| Service | URL | Où | Ports | TLS |
|---|---|---:|---:|---|
| Site web VaultWares | `https://vaultwares.ca` | `greencloud-vps` | `443` | Let’s Encrypt (nginx) |
| vault-flows SPA | `https://flows.vaultwares.ca` | `greencloud-vps` | `443` | Let’s Encrypt (nginx) |
| Noddit | `https://noddit.org` | `greencloud-vps` (proxy vers PC) | `443` | Let’s Encrypt (nginx) |
| Prom King | `https://prom-king.xyz` | `greencloud-vps` | `443` | Let’s Encrypt (nginx) |
| FullXXX | `https://fullxxx.video` | `greencloud-vps` | `443` | Let’s Encrypt (nginx) |
| Link sharing (PK) | `https://links.prom-king.xyz` | `greencloud-vps` | `443` | Let’s Encrypt (nginx) |
| Link sharing (FXV) | `https://links.fullxxx.video` | `greencloud-vps` | `443` | Let’s Encrypt (nginx) |

### Privé (Tailnet seulement)

| Service | URL / Point d'accès | Où | Ports | Auth |
|---|---|---:|---:|---|
| Docs privés | `https://docs.vaultwares.ca` | `greencloud-vps` | `443` | ACL Tailnet + liste blanche nginx |
| V.A.U.L.T Monitor | `https://monitor.vaultwares.ca` | `greencloud-vps` | `443` | ACL Tailnet + liste blanche nginx; `/monitor/*` proxy vers `Clopeux-Desktop:9001` |
| API (gateway) | `https://api.vaultwares.ca` | `greencloud-vps` | `443` | ACL Tailnet + header `X-VW-Gateway-Secret` |
| API Pipelines (direct) | `http://100.71.101.21:9001` | `Clopeux-Desktop` | `9001` | Auth d'application (JWT/clé API), ACL Tailnet |
| VaultWarden (service de secrets) | `https://warden.vaultwares.ca` | `greencloud-vps` | `443` | ACL Tailnet + autorisation VaultWarden |
| Webhooks GitHub (récepteur) | `https://hooks.vaultwares.ca/github` | `greencloud-vps` | `443` | Vérification de signature de webhook (nginx → `vw-webhookd` sur `127.0.0.1:9033`) |
| Gestionnaire de webhooks Tailscale | `http://127.0.0.1:8787` | `greencloud-vps` | `8787` | Tailnet-local seulement (`vaultwares-hooks`) |

## Modèle d’accès

- **Chiffrement réseau:** Tailscale (WireGuard).
- **TLS public:** nginx + Let’s Encrypt sur les VPS.
- **SSH:** **Seulement sur le Tailnet** (port `22` autorisé uniquement sur `tailscale0`).
- **RDP:** Seulement sur le Tailnet vers `Clopeux-Desktop:3389` (contrôlé par la politique).

## Liste d’intégration

1. Rejoindre le tailnet (client Tailscale).
2. Confirmer que votre appareil apparaît dans la console d'administration et est autorisé.
3. Lire cette page et le document de politique Tailscale.
4. Obtenir l'accès à VaultWarden (`https://warden.vaultwares.ca`) (liste blanche tailnet + autorisation de service).
5. Vérifier :
   - Vous pouvez atteindre `docs.vaultwares.ca` depuis le tailnet.
   - Vous pouvez atteindre `vaultwares.ca` publiquement.
   - Vous pouvez atteindre le point d'accès API PC nécessaire pour votre travail (si la politique le permet).
